_comment: KSI evaluation rules for Plane 2: IR -> KSI evaluation.
exclude_controls._comment_exclude: List control IDs to skip entirely (verdict = excluded).
_comment_require_all: false (default): A control passes if ANY referenced evidence item has
true:            A control passes only when ALL referenced evidence items pass.
Use this for strict zero-tolerance environments.

_comment_overrides: Optional per-control rule override.  The key is the control ID (must
match the 'id' field in the IR controls array).
